name: computer-vision-engineering
description: Computer-vision engineering team — 2 agents (cv-systems-architect, cv-implementation-engineer) for the CV-specific discipline that generic ML doesn't own: framing the task (classification / detection / segmentation / OCR / tracking / pose / vision-LLM), choosing the model family against an accuracy + latency + deployment-target budget, dataset & annotation strategy, and building the pipeline (preprocessing, off-the-shelf-vs-fine-tune, inference/serving, and edge/real-time optimization via ONNX/TensorRT/OpenVINO). 3 skills (frame-a-cv-task, design-cv-dataset-and-eval, optimize-cv-inference), a knowledge bank (a Mermaid task->model-family tree + a cloud-vs-edge inference tree + a dated 2026 model & tooling map), 7 best-practices. Distinct from ml-engineering (generic training/MLOps), ai-rag-engineering (text/RAG), and embedded-iot-engineering (firmware/HAL). Seams: streaming-media-engineering (video delivery), performance-engineering (latency budgets). Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
